# Discourses

*[Epictetus](../philosophers/epictetus.md) · 108*

Notes taken by Arrian on [Epictetus](../philosophers/epictetus.md)'s oral teaching at his school in Nicopolis, the Discourses unfold across four surviving books the Stoic doctrine applied to daily life. We see the teacher debating with his students about freedom, fate, and the right use of impressions.
